ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name or code of the sample */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., coffee, chocolate) */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Batch identifier for the sample */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "sampling_date" TEXT /* Date of sampling */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the sample */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the sample */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sample (e.g., pending, evaluated, archived) */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Overall quality score derived from sensory evaluations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_product_type FOREIGN KEY ("product_type") REFERENCES products ("product_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessors" (
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessor */,
  "assessor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the assessor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the assessor */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., coffee, chocolate) */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of last training */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification level of the assessor */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the assessor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last evaluation performed by the assessor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replicates" (
  "replicate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each replicate */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being evaluated */,
  "replicate_number" INTEGER /* Number of the replicate (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessor performing the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation method used for the replicate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the replicate (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the replicate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("replicate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replicates_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES assessors ("assessor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replicates_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES evaluation_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replicates_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensory_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "replicate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the replicate being evaluated */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the sample (1-10 scale) */,
  "sour" REAL /* Sourness of the sample (1-10 scale) */,
  "bitter" REAL /* Bitterness of the sample (1-10 scale) */,
  "sweet" REAL /* Sweetness of the sample (1-10 scale) */,
  "tobacco" REAL /* Tobacco flavor intensity (1-10 scale) */,
  "roasted" REAL /* Roasted flavor intensity (1-10 scale) */,
  "nutty" REAL /* Nutty flavor intensity (1-10 scale) */,
  "chocolate" REAL /* Chocolate flavor intensity (1-10 scale) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the evaluation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the evaluation */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score derived from all attributes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensory_evaluations_replicate_id FOREIGN KEY ("replicate_id") REFERENCES replicates ("replicate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., coffee, chocolate) */,
  "flavor_profile" TEXT /* Flavor profile of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the product */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the product (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the product details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the batch belongs to */,
  "batch_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the batch */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "production_location" TEXT /* Location where the batch was produced */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the batch */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the batch */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the batch (e.g., in production, completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the batch details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol or procedure for the method */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the method (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the method details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_method_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being assigned a method */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation method */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the method was assigned to the sample */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_method_assignments_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_method_assignments_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES evaluation_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., assessor, manager, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Device information (e.g., browser, OS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
